title: New household onboarding
preconditions: Fresh household container is running with /data mounted.
Operator has copied deploy/household/.env.example to deploy/household/.env.
No admin, household, learner, or trajectory state exists in the database.
setup_path: Start the household container from deploy/household with docker compose up --build.
Run uv run python scripts/rehearse_proof_scenarios.py --base-url http://localhost:8000 --scenario new_household_onboarding.
If an admin already exists, rerun with --admin-api-key or DIBBLE_PROOF_ADMIN_API_KEY.
execution_path: POST /api/setup/admin when the runtime has no operator.
POST /api/users for the parent and learners; use the returned learner_id values.
POST /api/households/me/learners/{learner_id}/goals to create the first proof trajectory with the parent key.
visible_outcome: The parent overview shows the seeded household, both learners, first trajectory state, guided approval posture, and any first-session blockers without database inspection.
approval_hooks: Parent preferences require modality introduction, trajectory revision, and high-autonomy session approval.

rehearsal_steps.action: Start the household compose stack and open /ready.
rehearsal_steps.expected_observation: Readiness returns setup_required with database persistence passing and setup/admin next steps.
rehearsal_steps.proof_signal: The deployment can start before secrets and admin state exist, while making the missing setup explicit.

rehearsal_steps.action: Create the initial admin/operator credential, then create one parent user and one learner user.
rehearsal_steps.expected_observation: The learner user receives a learner_id and a default learner profile is created server-side.
rehearsal_steps.proof_signal: Household participants are represented without frontend-derived learner state.

rehearsal_steps.action: Run household setup with the learner_id and guided parent preferences.
rehearsal_steps.expected_observation: Household overview shows the learner, cadence status, approval settings, and first session suggestion state.
rehearsal_steps.proof_signal: The parent surface becomes the primary POC control plane.

rehearsal_steps.expected_observation: Configured runtime moves from setup_required toward ready or degraded with concrete remaining warnings.
rehearsal_steps.proof_signal: Startup and first-run status are operator-readable without database inspection.

expected_observations: A new household can be created without hand-editing the database.
Learner state persists in SQLite under the mounted household volume.
The parent can see first-session readiness and approval posture before learner activity begins.
success_criteria: The parent can create the household and attach learners through documented API/UI paths.
Readiness explains every missing first-run requirement.
Restarting the container preserves the household and learner profile.
reset_notes: Stop the compose stack and remove the dibble-household-data volume to rehearse a true fresh start.
